MaxLineLength:FFTProcessor.kt$FFTProcessor$val tImag = kotlin.math.sin(angle * k) * real[i + k + halfLen] + cos(angle * k) * imag[i + k + halfLen]
MaxLineLength:FFTProcessor.kt$FFTProcessor$val tReal = cos(angle * k) * real[i + k + halfLen] - kotlin.math.sin(angle * k) * imag[i + k + halfLen]
MaxLineLength:HearingTestActiveScreen.kt$text = "Focus on the subtle tones. Tap as soon as you detect the sound in your ${state.currentEar.name.lowercase()} ear."
MaxLineLength:HearingTestResultsScreen.kt$text = "This test provides relative hearing thresholds for personal tracking. For clinical diagnosis, consult an audiologist."
